description:
An all-powerful, shiny, glimmering sword, known to
be able to cut deities in half.
name: Almighty Deity-Slaying Sword

description: It's a sword.
name: Sword

description: Really effective against bats. Two-handed.
name: Bow

description: An axe.
name: Axe

description:
A tree branch with some magical properties... I guess?
Plants a seed on the enemy that deals damage over time.
name: Branch Wand

description: A big stick that shoots magical ouchy bolts.
name: Staff

description: A pretty wand full of love and friendship.
name: Pixie Wand

description:
A tree branch with a vampiric essence. Casts a spell
that restores the user's HP by half the damage dealt.
name: Sanguine Wand
note:
<Handed Replace: Drain>
<Synthesis Ingredients>
Branch Wand
Bat Wing: 2
Bat Fang
</Synthesis Ingredients>

description:
A pretty long, heavy sword. Two-handed, but packs
good power.
name: Longsword

description:
Welcome to the Club. Effective when the enemy's as
hard as stone.
name: Club

description:
Imbued with holy power to bash an opponent's head in.
Two-handed.
name: Divine Baton

description: A sword but shorter.
name: Dagger

description:
Stores mana. Can channel it to increase magical
attack.
name: Orb

description: Stores mana. Can channel it to create a barrier.
name: Tome of Warding

description: A shield.
name: Shield

description:
It's a steel ball! Run! Can penetrate defenses, which
scales with agility difference, and can stun.
name: Steel Ball

description:
A small yet ultra light weapon. Increases your evasion
slightly. Attack can poison the target.
name: Venom Dagger

description: A sharp sword.
name: Steel Sword

description: A sharp, long sword. Two-handed.
name: Steel Longsword

description: A sharp... bow? Slightly higher hit chance. Two-handed.
name: Steel Bow

description: A sharp spear with a fast attack. Two-handed.
name: Steel Spear

description:
A shield that was reinforced. Guarding blocks 20% more
damage.
name: Reinforced Shield

description:
A magic-resistant shield. Slightly reduces magic
damage received.
name: Guardian Shield

description: A generic sword used by travelers.
name: Traveler's Sword

description:
Bear wetness to this amazing wand. It splashes water
onto an enemy.
name: Wand of Wetness

description:
Sword made of goblin... uhh... tech. Small chance to
inflict bleed. Doubles damage against bleeding enemies.
name: Goblin Sword
note:
<itemRarity:1>
<Handed Replace: Goblin Slash>
<Synthesis Ingredients>
Goblin Scrap: 3
</Synthesis Ingredients>

description: Chopped axe. Damage from hits varies wildly.
name: Chipped Cleaver
note:
<itemRarity:1>
<Handed Replace: Hack>
<Synthesis Ingredients>
Goblin Scrap: 3
</Synthesis Ingredients>

description: Decent staff. Reduces mana cost by 10%.
name: Traveler's Staff

description:
Shiny, crystalline blade. 30% chance for attack to
strike twice.
name: Resonance Sword

description:
A bow used by hunters. Deals bonus damage if the
opponent's HP is more than 70%.
name: Hunter's Bow

description:
Big metal bat with holy power that teaches humility.
Bonus damage proportional to number of target buffs.
name: Humbler

description: Wand that releases short magical pulses thrice.
name: Pulse Wand

description:
Shoots arrows that can explode, dealing heavy damage
and burning the target, but hard to aim.
name: Dynamite Bow

description: Wooden shovel. You can dig with it I suppose.
name: Wooden Shovel

description:
A bit heavy, but does a weak attack 5 times with
bleed chance. Two-handed.
name: Mining Drill

description:
Wand that releases sound waves at all opponents twice.
Chance to confuse.
name: Echo Wand

description:
It's a bit poopy so it'll be a bit hard to land your
attack... but the attack ignores 30% of defense.
name: Tarnished Blade

description:
Designed to kill opponents brutally. Yikes. Strong
attack with chance to bleed.
name: Mace

description:
Idk why RPG maker doesn't have a hammer icon. So sad.
So sad. Just an ordinary hammer btw. Two-handed,
name: Hammer

description:
Slightly increases your hit and crit rate.
Comes with confusion chance. Target is easier to hit.
name: Seeker Staff

description:
Unleashes rain on all opponents, dealing small damage
and wetting them.
name: Rain Rod

description: A sharp spear with a fast attack. Two-handed.
name: Forest Glaive

description:
A sharp, long sword. Critical hit rate is slightly
increased. Adds skill "Thin Cleave."
name: Katana

description: A leafy bow.
name: Leafage Bow

description:
I just invented a cool new word, "Thornice." Isn't it
neat? Target of the skill gains a thorn barrier.
name: Tome of Thornice

description:
A magical wand that plants a flower on the target that,
when damaged or removed, will explode and deal damage.
name: Bloom Wand

description:
A whistle that summons a flock of birds to attack your
enemies. The birds aren't the most accurate, though.
name: Bird Whistle

description: Summons a Royal Spider.
name: Royal Spider Staff

description: A spidery bow. Arrows slow down the target.
name: Spider Bow

name: Arcane Staff
